title: plantago humilis subsp. atlantis
intro: Plantago humilis subsp. atlantis, also known as Dwarf Plantain, is a subspecies of plantain that is native to the Mediterranean region and is characterized by its small, rounded leaves and tall, slender stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Plantago humilis subsp. atlantis include its potential to reduce swelling, promote healing, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can also be dried and used as a powder or tincture.
